title: zornia orbiculata
intro: Zornia orbiculata is a type of plant that belongs to the family Fabaceae, commonly known as a bean or legume. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant is rich in flavonoids and alkaloids, which are believed to provide various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. In herbal preparations, Zornia orbiculata is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
